description:
EU parallel track. Submission package complete.

**Ready:**
- meta/applications/eic-step1-short-proposal.md
- meta/applications/eic-pitch-deck.md (export to PDF)
- meta/applications/eic-video-script.md (record 3 min)

**Blocked on:**
1. EU Funding Portal account + PIC (natural person OK at Step 1)
2. 10-slide PDF pitch deck
3. 3-minute video

**Submit:** Rolling, batched 1st Tuesday/month 17:00 Brussels
**Portal:** https://ec.europa.eu/info/funding-tenders/opportunities/portal

status.comment: Proposal text complete; needs PIC login + PDF deck + video recording
